name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Collapsible content sections with single or multiple open items. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.

content.text: Accordion compound components must be used within Accordion
AccordionTrigger/AccordionContent must be used within AccordionItem

usageSnippet:
import { Accordion, AccordionHeader, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "@/components/ui/accordion" export default function AccordionDefault() { return ( What is @diffgazer/ui?

A terminal-inspired component registry for React. Install components via CLI and own the source.

How do I install components?

Run dgadd add button to add a component to your project.

Can I customize components?

Yes. Components are copied into your project as source files. Modify them freely.

) }

accordion-custom-handle.raw:
import { Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent } from "@/components/ui/accordion" export default function AccordionCustomHandle() { return ( +}> Custom handle (+)

Pass any ReactNode as the handle prop to replace the default chevron.

No handle (hidden)

Pass handle={"{null}"} to hide the indicator entirely.

Default chevron

Without the handle prop, the animated Chevron component is used by default.

) }

content.text: Multiple sections can be open simultaneously.
Click any trigger to toggle that section independently.
This section starts open because its value is in the defaultValue array.

docs.description: Collapsible content sections with single or multiple open items. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes.

anatomy.name: Accordion
anatomy.note: Root (manages open state, single or multiple mode)

anatomy.name: AccordionHeader
anatomy.note: Heading wrapper for trigger (h3 by default, configurable via as prop)

notes.title: Single vs Multiple
notes.content: In single mode (default), only one item can be open. Set type='multiple' to allow several items open at once.

notes.title: Collapsible
notes.content: In single mode, collapsible defaults to true. Set collapsible={false} to always keep one item open.

notes.title: Keyboard Navigation
notes.content: Arrow Up/Down moves focus between triggers. Home/End jumps to first/last trigger. Enter or Space toggles the focused item. Navigation wraps around.

keyboard.description: Built-in keyboard navigation via @diffgazer/keys useNavigation. Arrow Up/Down moves focus between accordion triggers, Home/End jumps to first/last, Enter/Space toggles the focused item.
